nodes.name: Accounting Students Association
nodes.desc_html: Our mission is to provide our members with the best opportunities by aligning ourselves with industry and creating events that enable students to build professional skills and kickstart their careers.

nodes.name: Actuarial Students' Society
nodes.desc_html: We provide students with comprehensive information about the actuarial profession, accreditation and career opportunities in both traditional and non-traditional actuarial fields.

nodes.name: Adventist Students on Campus
nodes.desc_html: a christian club that emphasises not only in spiritual enrichment but physical, mental and social excellence.

nodes.name: Aerospace and Rocket Engineering Society (ARES)
nodes.desc_html: We engineer technologies for our competition entries & run events/workshops for our members.

nodes.name: Afghan Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Agricultural and Food Sciences Society
nodes.desc_html: The society runs social and information events to connect agriculture students, including Ag Ball, Boat Cruise, Ag Games, regular Farma Parma nights and industry information sessions.

nodes.name: AIESEC in Melbourne
nodes.desc_html: AIESEC aims to develop leadership and cross-cultural understanding in students through practical experiences. Join our membership if you want to foster soft skills that are relevant and transferable.

nodes.name: ALP Club
nodes.desc_html: A social way to engage in progressive, left-wing politics. Our core values are unionism, feminism and democratic socialism. We are heavily involved in activism, YLL and the union movement.

nodes.name: Animal Protection Society (UMAPS)
nodes.desc_html: A place for those who love animals to get together and give a voice to non-human animals who cannot speak for themselves!

nodes.name: Apollo Music Society
nodes.desc_html:
Music, Friends, Charity!

Come join our ensembles: Guitar ensemble, Choir, Acapollo (a capella), Rock Bands, Fusion Stage Band, Jazz Band, Strings Ensemble, Composition Workshop, and Jam Sessions!

nodes.name: Arab Student Association
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Arts Students Society
nodes.desc_html: M-ASS is a social and educational club welcoming members from all faculties. Membership is just $5 for the whole year, with annual highlights being Camp, Edu events, Ball, fortnightly BBQs and Cruise!

nodes.name: Asia-Pacific Development Initiative
nodes.desc_html: We host events to create a platform for students looking to push for long-term change in the Asia-Pacific.

nodes.name: Australia-China Youth Association
nodes.desc_html: ACYA is a vibrant community of young Australians and Chinese interested in promoting cross-cultural understanding and developing lasting friendships through various social, career and education events

nodes.name: Australian Wall Street
nodes.desc_html: A student society that aims to provide resources and networking opportunities for international students at the University of Melbourne who would like to pursue a career in the business field.

nodes.name: AWS Cloud Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Bangladeshi Student Society
nodes.desc_html: Supporting new students, organising fun events, and fostering a healthy Bangladeshi community- that's what MUBSS is about. Let us be your home away from home!

nodes.name: Banking on Women
nodes.desc_html: BoW is dedicated to championing gender diversity in the financial and professional services industries. We empower, educate and encourage members of all genders through our events/initiatives.

nodes.name: Beer and Cider Society
nodes.desc_html: We love everything about beer and cider! Come along to our events and enjoy some free drinks and make some new friends!

nodes.name: Bhakti Yoga Club
nodes.desc_html: Join us for relaxing music meditation, weekly yoga sessions and weekly vegan lunch to highlight living in harmony with nature as well as wellbeing workshops on topics related to mind, body and soul

nodes.name: Biomedical Engineering Society
nodes.desc_html: A university club that supports Biomedical Engineering students and those interested in the field, through the facilitation of various social and academic events partnered with industry and academia

nodes.name: Biomedicine Student Society
nodes.desc_html: The Biomedicine Students' Society run for Biomedicine Students by Biomedicine Students. Our social and academic events will help you form life-long friendships and make the transition to uni easy!

nodes.name: Biomedicine Students' Orchestra
nodes.desc_html: MUBSO is an orchestra for students from all faculties, united by a love of music and passion for charity. Our orchestra holds two concerts every year, performing famous classical and soundtrack works.

nodes.name: Bollywood Club
nodes.desc_html:
Join us for a fun-filled year complete with dance workshops, trivia nights, Bollywood themed parties, picnics, giveaways, golgappas and lots more! 

Spreading the magic of Bollywood on campus

nodes.name: Book Club
nodes.desc_html: The Book Club aims to foster an inclusive and welcoming environment in which students can connect with one another and have fun discussing and developing their interpretation of literary texts.

nodes.name: Bubble Tea Society
nodes.desc_html: Our club is dedicated to sharing the joys of bubble tea with boba beginners and veterans alike! We hope to unite bubble tea enthusiasts, and we aim to host fun boba tasting events for all to enjoy.

nodes.name: Business Analytics Students Society
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: BusinessOne Consulting University of Melbourne
nodes.desc_html: A pro-bono consulting club helping start-ups solve their most pressing challenges, illuminating the start-up scene with publications, competitions, and events.

nodes.name: CAINZ
nodes.desc_html: A commerce-centric society with the aim of bridging the gap between academic and professional practice. We do this through our extensive publications and a wide array of engaging events.

nodes.name: Cambodian Students Society
nodes.desc_html: Our mission is to establish a visible community of Cambodian students and students who are interested in Cambodian culture and language within the university.

nodes.name: Cantonese Students Association
nodes.desc_html: Are you keen on learning Cantonese and enjoying Dim Sum? Do Yumcha and Mahjong sound like your interests? Aiming to promote Cantonese culture and language on campus, you are welcome to join CSA.

nodes.name: Car Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Card Crew
nodes.desc_html: We meet up every Friday, typically 4 to 7, to play card games and catch up over food and drinks. We mainly play card games like Big 2, Poker, and Saboteur, but we are always welcome to try new games.

nodes.name: CastOn Charity Group
nodes.desc_html: We're a craft focused group which raises funds for charity through selling the creations our members make. Materials are provided, you don't need to know how to knit, sew or crochet, we'll teach you!

nodes.name: Catholic Society
nodes.desc_html: Voted UMSU's Best Small Club of 2020! We are a community that encourages students to grow closer to God and deepen their appreciation for the Catholic faith.

nodes.name: Catholics of One Spirit Down Under (COSDU)
nodes.desc_html: COSDU provides students with a platform for faith formation, fellowship and social justice activities. The org is a place for those who want to deepen their love for Christ and share His truth.

nodes.name: Chariot Journal
nodes.desc_html: The undergraduate history journal of the University of Melbourne. We provide a space for undergraduate students to engage with history in their own way.

nodes.name: Chemical Engineering Students Society
nodes.desc_html: The official student club for Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering students. We run a variety of social, academic, and industry focused events throughout the year.

nodes.name: Chess Club
nodes.desc_html:
🎓 UniMelb Chess Club ♟️ Hosting online and in-person tournaments, make friends and relationships that last a life time One for all, and all for one! 😤
Enjoy social chess, workshops and more!

nodes.name: Chinese Calligraphy Club
nodes.desc_html: We are here to offer you a brand new experience to learn this beautiful art of writing in an entertaining way.

nodes.name: Chinese Culture Society
nodes.desc_html: The club aims to promote and hence consolidate traditional Chinese Culture within the university. A secondary goal of CCS is to provide opportunities for social interaction and exchange of ideas.

nodes.name: Chinese Debating Group
nodes.desc_html:
A place for Chinese debate lovers.
WeChat ID：CDGbabyXWZ2

nodes.name: Chinese Music Group
nodes.desc_html: We are a non-profit organisation that provides students with the opportunity to participate in various Chinese cultural and music-related activities.

nodes.name: Chinese Students and Scholars Association
nodes.desc_html: We organise various events for Chinese International students to connect, have fun and learn. Join us for discounts at over 100 merchants, 10+ events every semester and brilliant cultural fairs.

nodes.name: Chocolate Lovers Society
nodes.desc_html: Join us for some delicious events and lots of freebies that are all bound to make your mouth water. We host regular events throughout the semester.

nodes.name: Christian Union
nodes.desc_html: We are a club committed to making Jesus known on campus! We invite anyone who is a bit curious about Christianity all the way to lifelong Christians to come, read the Bible and meet Jesus.

nodes.name: Civil and Structural Society
nodes.desc_html: MUCSS is a faculty based student-run body for Civil and Structural Engineering students. The aim of the club is to develop a strong cohort within the civil and structural community at the University.

nodes.name: Classics and Archaeology Society
nodes.desc_html: We run a range of academic and social events for Classics and Ancient World Studies students and ancient history aficionados. Our events include study sessions, trivia, movie nights and toga parties.

nodes.name: Clinical Audiology Students' Association
nodes.desc_html: CASA is a dedicated non-profit course-specific club that aims to cater to and represent Master of Clinical Audiology students at the University of Melbourne.

nodes.name: Coffee Appreciation For Enthusiasts
nodes.desc_html: We're a club dedicated to learning about and appreciating coffee in all its forms. We hold meet-ups where you can catch up with fellow enthusiasts and enjoy the highest-quality brews on campus!

nodes.name: Commerce Students Society
nodes.desc_html: The Commerce Students Society is the official faculty-based student club, which serves to bridge a gap between the student body, commercial industry and the academic framework of the UniMelb.

nodes.name: Competitive Programming Club
nodes.desc_html: Organise programming competitions, tutorials on algorithms and data structures, and industry events.

nodes.name: Computing and Information Systems Students Association
nodes.desc_html: CISSA represents the technology and IT student community at the University of Melbourne. We bridge the divide between university and industry by holding various social, industry and networking events.

nodes.name: Consistently Amazing Kitchen Endeavours
nodes.desc_html: Welcome to the wonderful UniMelb CAKE Club!

nodes.name: Construction Students Association
nodes.desc_html: We are a social and educational faculty affiliated club catered towards students taking a construction related degree or those interested in this field and host career and social events year-round.

nodes.name: Creative Literature and Writing Society
nodes.desc_html: We are a carefree, creative club that enjoys all things reading and writing. Join us weekly for discussions, writing exercises, feedback, and of course, fun!

nodes.name: Data Science Students Society (DS Cubed)
nodes.desc_html: DS Cubed aims to support data science students and help them develop into world-class data scientists. DS Cubed represents students from all data science related courses.

nodes.name: Debating Society
nodes.desc_html: Established in 1876, we promote debating at the University in all its forms. We offer weekly training, coaching opportunities, and participation in tournaments both nationally and internationally!

nodes.name: Drawing and Painting Club
nodes.desc_html:
DPC unites artists of any skill level interested in visual and graphic arts. 
Weekly meetups are held throughout the semester so members can learn, create, inspire, connect and improve!

nodes.name: Drone Aviation and Racing Engineering Society
nodes.desc_html: Our members will have the opportunity to build, design and fly, no matter their degree and experience.

nodes.name: Earth Sciences Students Society
nodes.desc_html: We're the department club for Earth Sciences! A social space for anyone interested in the planet and how it works. We have trivia nights, BBQs, study sessions and fun get-together events.

nodes.name: Economics Student Society of Australia
nodes.desc_html: A group of fun and like-minded individuals with a passion for all things economics! ESSA help connect students with professionals and academics to explore the impact of economics on the world.

nodes.name: Effective Altruism
nodes.desc_html: We are dedicated towards answering the question, "using evidence and reason, how can I do the most good possible?" We run educational courses, education events, career events, and regular socials.

nodes.name: Egyptian Club
nodes.desc_html: UMEC aims to promote Egyptian culture through fun events, featuring Egyptian music, language, history, and food. People of all backgrounds are welcome. Yallaaaaaa ba2aaaaaaa

nodes.name: Electrical Engineering Club
nodes.desc_html: A student club for Electrical Engineering students. MUEEC runs social events, technical skills workshops, makeathons and industry networking events, free for all members!

nodes.name: Embrace Education
nodes.desc_html: Join our exciting volunteer tutoring club, where we help mentor and tutor disadvantaged high school students. We run events all year round, raising awareness and advocating for education equality!

nodes.name: Enactus
nodes.desc_html: We are Enactus Melbourne – a club dedicated to solving social issues through entrepreneurialism.

nodes.name: Engineering Music Society
nodes.desc_html: A non-auditioned music club where musicians of any skill level or study background (NOT just engineering!) can play their instrument in a relaxed environment outside of work/study.

nodes.name: Engineering Students’ Club
nodes.desc_html: The club aims to provide social opportunities for its members, provide services to aid their Engineering studies, and support them through their university endeavours.

nodes.name: Engineers Without Borders
nodes.desc_html: JOIN EWB TODAY! We are a tightly knit volunteer community who love creating positive change in the world, making new friends and having fun along the way!

nodes.name: Environmental Engineers Society
nodes.desc_html: MUEES hosts social and professional events, e.g. networking events, games nights, study sessions, & more, to connect environmental engineering students with their peers, academics and professional

nodes.name: Esports
nodes.desc_html: Your home of Esports and Gaming at Unimelb!

nodes.name: Eurovision Social Club
nodes.desc_html: We share our love, love, peace, peace for all things Eurovision!!! Come together to celebrate this iconic song competition and meet fantastic people. #JoinUs for parties, food, and glittery madness!

nodes.name: Filipino Students Association
nodes.desc_html: Our club aims to promote the appreciation of Filipino culture, and to bring about a stronger relationship and understanding between the Filipino culture and the larger diverse student in UniMelb

nodes.name: Film Society
nodes.desc_html: We screen a diverse array of amazing films, every week! From the obscure to the well-known, from all around the globe. We love watching and talking about movies. Why not join us if you do too.

nodes.name: Filmmakers Collaborative
nodes.desc_html: Whether you're a writer dying to bring your script to life, a cinematographer with a vision, or a newbie learning how to hold a boom mic, UMFC shares a passion for any and all aspects of student films

nodes.name: Finance Student Association
nodes.desc_html: FSA aims to advance our members' careers in finance by building the bridge between tertiary studies and professional application. Our goal is to provide "Career. Learning. Community" to our members.

nodes.name: Financial Management Association of Australia
nodes.desc_html: Established in 1990 at The University of Melbourne, the FMAA promotes career awareness, facilitates professional development and connects students with firms in the financial services industry.

nodes.name: French Club
nodes.desc_html: Whether you're a cheese-eating, beret-wearing, Sartre-reading, wine-drinking francophone, or simply ate a croissant once; French Club has something for you! Bienvenue!

nodes.name: Friends of Unnatural Llamas (F.O.U.L.)
nodes.desc_html: A social Monty Python appreciation club, with a long history of silliness and being nuisances to general society.

nodes.name: Friends of Vets Beyond Borders Student Chapter
nodes.desc_html: Friends of Vets Beyond Borders Student Chapter is a cross-faculty group with an interest in supporting local and international veterinary aid and development, animal welfare and disease-control.

nodes.name: Game Makers' Club
nodes.desc_html: The UniMelb Game Makers' Club is open to everyone interested in game-making regardless of experience! We host game jams, meetups, social events, career events, and workshops!

nodes.name: Geomatics Society
nodes.desc_html: We are a club for students who are studying or interested in Geomatics. The aim of our club is to build a strong cohort in Geomatics through social, educational, and networking events for our members.

nodes.name: German Club
nodes.desc_html:
Speak German, learning German, are German, or just went to Berlin and found yourself?

Well, The German club is for you. All lovers of German language and culture are welcome.

nodes.name: Gleam Up Beauty, Business and Science
nodes.desc_html: We explore diverse areas in the artistry, business and science of the beauty industry. Our networking events & publications aim to enrich your university experience via our shared passion for beau

nodes.name: Global Affairs Society
nodes.desc_html: A non-partisan society focused on providing a forum for discussions about global affairs as well as domestic politics. Focused on helping provide pathways to careers in politics for our members.

nodes.name: Global Health Society
nodes.desc_html: We are a student-operated club seeking to educate, train and immerse students from all disciplines in issues surrounding public health, with the ethos of "thinking globally, acting locally".

nodes.name: Graphic Design Club
nodes.desc_html: Is graphic design your passion? The Graphic Design Club is a fun, inclusive environment for graphic design students, other BDES kids at Southbank, friends and anyone else interested in the field.

nodes.name: Greek Association (MUnGA)
nodes.desc_html: MUnGA is a very active club and has always boasted a good working relationship with UMSU - the Student Union on campus - to provide large scale and diverse events whilst celebrating Hellenism

nodes.name: Habitat for Humanity
nodes.desc_html: We are part of Habitat for Humanity, an international not-for-profit which began as a grassroots promote safe housing and help on volunteer build trips!

nodes.name: HackMelbourne
nodes.desc_html: Dedicated to hackathons, software development education and innovation, our vision is to run large intercollegiate hackathons for all students and provide tech-focused educational opportunities.

nodes.name: Hanfu Association
nodes.desc_html: Melbourne Hanfu Association aims to provide a platform for everyone to explore interests in Chinese traditional garments while consolidating traditional Chinese Culture and traditional garments.

nodes.name: Healthy Eating and Nutrition Society
nodes.desc_html: We hold educational and social events throughout the semester, including career seminars and healthy food giveaways. We have a keen focus on food equity and sustainability, and nutrition education.

nodes.name: History Society
nodes.desc_html: We invite anyone with even just a passing interest in history to come and share their passion with us. Our mission is to foster a love of history on campus through our academic and social events.

nodes.name: Hong Kong Students Association
nodes.desc_html: We aim to bring together members of the Hong Kong community, as well as all those who are interested in the promotion and celebration of Hong Kong's unique and vibrant culture.

nodes.name: Indian Club
nodes.desc_html: Promoting Indian culture to all University students, regardless of background and uniting them through a diverse array of social, cultural and recreational events throughout the year.

nodes.name: Indian Graduate Students Society
nodes.desc_html: Indian Graduate Students Society is the biggest Indian club at the University of Melbourne catering to Indian students so that they a sense of Home away from Home in the University.

nodes.name: Indonesian Students Association
nodes.desc_html: A non-profit organisation for Indonesians studying at UniMelb, aiming to be the social and cultural representative of Indonesia in Australia

nodes.name: Information Security Club (MISC)
nodes.desc_html: Learn about ethical hacking and information security through weekly workshops, competitions and guest speakers event. Connect with the cybersecurity industry.

nodes.name: International Vietnamese Students at the University of Melbourne
nodes.desc_html: Designed as a playground to connect international Vietnamese students, IVSUM is a community where individuals can relate, engage, and create meaningful bonds in each other's social and school life.

nodes.name: International Youth and Students for Social Equality
Interprofessional Education and Practice Health Students Network
nodes.desc_html: The aims of IPEP-HSN include linking health students prior to entering the workplace through educational and social networking events.

nodes.name: Iranian Society
nodes.desc_html: Join the University of Melbourne Iranian Society for enriching cultural events, vibrant social gatherings, and supportive academic activities. Experience the warmth of Iranian culture on campus!

nodes.name: Islamic Society
nodes.desc_html: We aim to create an environment to support Muslim students in their academic, religious and social development and promote understandings of Islam and Muslims.

nodes.name: Italian Social Club
nodes.desc_html: Our club holds cultural events where our members indulge in the Italian cuisine and language through Pizza and Nutella donuts stalls, study clubs, a boat cruise and Ball. Celebrate Italy with MUISC!

nodes.name: Japanese Club
nodes.desc_html: Join our vibrant MUJC community to indulge in your love of Japan and participate in a wide range of social and cultural events! Our events are relaxed, friendly, and a great way to meet new people!

nodes.name: Jewellery and Culture Society
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Jewish Students Society
nodes.desc_html: The home of Jewish Students at the University of Melbourne. We ensure that Jewish identity can be expressed proudly and freely across campus, whether it be through celebration, education or advocacy.

nodes.name: Korean Students Society
nodes.desc_html:
Join us for a diverse range of K-food picnics, cooking classes, parties, mentoring, and more! 


Connect, have fun, and experience K-culture with us! 🎉🇰🇷

nodes.name: Kpop Club
nodes.desc_html: If you like dancing to the latest K-pop hits, belting out songs by your fave K-pop artists, binging K-dramas, or just enjoying the pop culture sensation that is K-pop, you'll find your home at UKC.

nodes.name: Labor Club
nodes.desc_html: A lively & active club with frequent social and State/Federal MP events. We are passionate about progressive ideas influencing party politics. Let’s get Labor Elected this year!!

nodes.name: Language Exchange
nodes.desc_html: We love different cultures and languages! We provide free language classes through our language sessions run by volunteer hosts, as well as language-themed social events for our members.

nodes.name: Lebanese Students Society
nodes.desc_html: MULSS is a cultural club dedicated to celebrating all things Lebanon û from food, to language, to creative arts û bringing together students of Lebanese heritage and students of all backgrounds!

nodes.name: Let’s Talk Conversation Group
nodes.desc_html: A diverse close-knit university club and social platform for global students who are keen for fun conversations, cultural exchange and making great friends.

nodes.name: Liberal Club
nodes.desc_html: Our club is the sole centre-right/conservative club on campus. We host weekly debates, interstate trips, an internship program, and a variety of social and drinking events. Join us!

nodes.name: Macedonian Student Society
nodes.desc_html: MUMSS is a club for both Macedonian and non-Macedonian students at The University of Melbourne which seeks to promote the Macedonian culture, history and identity among the university community.

nodes.name: Malaysians of Melbourne University
nodes.desc_html:
A student association for Malaysians studying at the University of Melbourne. We aim to be a 'Home away from home' for you.
 We hope to provide our members many fond 'MoMUnts' while in Melbourne

nodes.name: Mandarin Language Club
nodes.desc_html: Hi, everyone, welcome to Mandarin Language Club! In MLC, we provide free Mandarin lessons and organize various culture-related activities and events. Come and join us!!!

nodes.name: Marketing Intelligence
nodes.desc_html: We strive to bring the most out of your university life and enhance your degree with practical hands-on experience.

nodes.name: Matcha Lovers Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Mathematics & Statistics Society
nodes.desc_html: MUMS welcome anyone with an interest in mathematics and statistics! Our membership is free and open to everyone with all levels of experience in maths. Sign up and be part of this welcoming community!

nodes.name: Mechanical Engineering Student Society
nodes.desc_html: MESS empowers ambitious Mechanical and Mechatronic engineering students to explore their passion for engineering, gain technical and employability skills, create connections, and make lifelong friends

nodes.name: Melbourne Microfinance Initiative
nodes.desc_html: MMI provides pro-bono consulting services to NFPs and Microfinance Institutions across the Asia-Pacific. Additionally, we aim to empower students through social impact focused events & publication

nodes.name: Melbourne Sports Business Society
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: MUR Motorsports
nodes.desc_html: The UoM Motorsports Club is student-run. MUR fosters interest in engineering and motorsport! If you speak F1, this one's for you!

nodes.name: Music Students Society
nodes.desc_html: The MSS is the official student club of the Melbourne Conservatorium of Music, providing social activities for members and educational support for students - welcome to all like-minded music people!

nodes.name: Myanmar Students Association
nodes.desc_html: Our club is for everyone that misses Myanmar, wants to meet wholesome new people, or would like to appreciate our culture! We will be your home away from home!

nodes.name: Networking for Ecological and Marine Opportunities (NEMO)
New Zealand Students Society
nodes.desc_html: NZ-themed events and socialising! Open to students of all nationalities to learn more about New Zealand and a club where fellow Kiwis can connect and celebrate Kiwi culture. Watch this space!

nodes.name: Next Generation Trading Club
nodes.desc_html: We are the first AI and Trading club in Australia. We aim to research the potential of generative AI in trading.

nodes.name: Nursing Students’ Society
nodes.desc_html: We run social events, assist new nursing students entering the UoM postgraduate qualification with settling into the course and provide a link between students and academic staff.

nodes.name: OmniSci Magazine
nodes.desc_html: OmniSci Magazine is a student-led science magazine and social club at UniMelb. We are a group of students passionate about science communication and a platform for students to share their creativity.

nodes.name: Optometry Students Society
nodes.desc_html: UMOSS supports Doctor of Optometry and research students within the Department of Optometry and Vision Sciences, providing opportunities to connect with employers and the wider health care community.

nodes.name: Overseas Christian Fellowship (O.C.F)
nodes.desc_html: Our vision is to reach out to international students in Australia, build them up to be Christ's disciples and send them back as disciple-makers.

nodes.name: Oxfam Group
nodes.desc_html: We are a student-run representative of Oxfam Australia, focused on promoting awareness of Oxfam campaigns and a range of issues including Indigenous health, fair trade and poverty alleviation.

nodes.name: Pakistani Society
nodes.desc_html: YOUR medium to connect with Pakistani culture, food and the people! Fun filled events to professional development opportunities,MUPS is here to boost your social, cultural and personal development.

nodes.name: Passion Fruit Projects
nodes.desc_html: PFP is a student-lead club that cultivates creative ideas and passions into thriving projects through peer discussion, exhibition and publishing opportunities, guest speaker events and more!

nodes.name: Philosophy Society
nodes.desc_html: We're a society for students who are studying or interested in philosophy.  Our vision is to provide a fun and inclusive community for students to explore and develop their philosophical interests.

nodes.name: Physics Students Society
nodes.desc_html: The PSS provides a network for physics students to share knowledge and ideas about physics, and to get to know other physics lovers! Membership is FREE and open to everyone!

nodes.name: Physiotherapy Students' Society
nodes.desc_html: MUPSS’ provides Doctor of Physiotherapy students with ongoing resources and assistance. We deliver social and educational events to ensure one’s time in the DPT program is fun, supportive and enga

nodes.name: Piano Society
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Pirates
nodes.desc_html: We're a social club dedicated to all things musical and piratey. Come along to Rage against the Machine, uncover buried loot, and Yo Ho Ho and a bottle of rum!

nodes.name: planetUNI
nodes.desc_html: planetUNI (connected to Planetshakers church) is a community where everyone can meet new friends, and be empowered to make a difference in the world.

nodes.name: Pokemon Observation, Knowledge and Evolution Nation (POKEN)
Postgraduate Environment Network
nodes.desc_html: PEN is a professional and social network for sustainably minded postgraduate students from the University of Melbourne. Primarily to support students and friends of the Master of Environment.

nodes.name: Power to Change
nodes.desc_html: Power to Change is a Christian club dedicated to connecting people to Jesus and each other, building them in their faith, and sending them out to share God's love.

nodes.name: Pre-Law Society
nodes.desc_html: Melbourne University Pre-Law Society (MUPS) is an organisation that aims to empower undergraduate students who wish to study law or learn more about the legal profession.

nodes.name: Psychology Association
nodes.desc_html: Passionate about Psychology? Look no further and become a part of the MUPA team! We are the only MSPS affiliated club on campus, organising social & academic events for Psychology students!

nodes.name: Punjabi Student Association
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Quantitative Trading Society
nodes.desc_html: A place for like-minded individuals to connect and increase their understanding and proficiency in quantitative trading.

nodes.name: Radiology and Medical Imaging
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. Once the membership recruitment stage completed, upcoming in-person meeting of the members will be advertised.

nodes.name: Reels Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Development
nodes.desc_html: Whether you're keen on getting exposure to exciting new AI technologies, or having meaningful discussions about the emerging role of AI in society, RAID will be right up your alley.

nodes.name: Ring of Choir
nodes.desc_html: We're an un-auditioned a cappella pop choir with weekly rehearsals. It's a great way to meet fantastic people and practise your vocals. If you're enthusiastic about singing, this is the club for you!

nodes.name: Robogals Melbourne
nodes.desc_html: We aim to inspire, engage and empower young women into engineering and related fields by delivering interactive workshops for primary and secondary school students.

nodes.name: Robotics, Engineering & Competition Society
nodes.desc_html: We are a competitive robotics club who build robots to compete in national and international events. Our primary goal is to improve the STEM education of students around Australia.

nodes.name: Saudi Students Association at Melbourne University (SAMU)
Science Students Society
nodes.desc_html: As one of the largest clubs, we connect students from all backgrounds and degrees through our social events with free food, Educational and Professional opportunities and the best parties at Uni!

nodes.name: Sexpression
nodes.desc_html: We facilitate frank discussions on sex, relationships and power. We host events every month with qualified sex educators in a safe and inclusive space! We are the sex-ed you didn't get in school.

nodes.name: Singapore Students Society
nodes.desc_html: We provide social events for students in the heart of Melbourne. Maximize YOUR university experience with us by joining our diverse range of activities û from educational workshops to outdoor events!

nodes.name: Slavic Languages Club
nodes.desc_html: Admire the works of Tolstoy, Dostoevsky, and Gogol, delight in the music of Chopin, Dvorak, and Tchaikovsky, or crave Ukrainian borscht, Polish vodka, or the Rakia of the Balkans?

nodes.name: Soccer Appreciation Society
nodes.desc_html: Providing a place for soccer fans, regardless of being competitive or not, to socialise and find a sense of belonging through the beautiful game by playing, talking, watching and breathing football.

nodes.name: Social Impact Investment Fund
nodes.desc_html: SIIF has an ideology of uniting stock portfolio management and charitable endeavours. Our student-managed fund aims for high market returns, issuing all capital gains to philanthropic organisations.

nodes.name: Socialist Alternative
nodes.desc_html: If you hate capitalism and want to do something about it, check out our group!

nodes.name: Society for Astronomy at Melbourne University (SAMU)
nodes.desc_html: The Society for Astronomy at Melbourne University (SAMU) is a vibrant student organization dedicated to fostering a passion for astronomy among its members.

nodes.name: Society for Transportation Enthusiasts At Melbourne (STEAM)
Speech Pathology Students' Society
nodes.desc_html: We represent the collective needs/wants of MoSP students. We aim to unite both years enrolled in the course by providing mentoring, networking, social and educational opportunities to students.

nodes.name: Sri Lankan Students Association
nodes.desc_html: Join our club to engage in community-oriented events, to meet a range of diverse, new people and to support our charitable causes.

nodes.name: StartUp Link Unimelb
nodes.desc_html: Aiming to connect young, entrepreneurial minds to career opportunities in the startup world through a range of networking, recruitment and skill-development opportunities.

nodes.name: Statistics and Mathematics Postgraduate Society (StAMPS)
nodes.desc_html: Our purpose is to provide academic and social support to postgrad maths & stats students in our school. We organise social events, seminars, study sessions, and advocate for wellbeing. Join today!

nodes.name: Student Exchange Society
nodes.desc_html: MUSEX is a social club for literally anyone to join- no matter if you're an exchange, international or local student. We host events nearly every week, everything from parties, dinners to excursions!

nodes.name: Students' Association of Management and Marketing
nodes.desc_html: SAMM is a student society that aims to bridge the gap between students and the management & marketing industries, offering a wide range of networking events and opportunities, and skills workshops

nodes.name: Students of Royal Melbourne (STORM)
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Swifties’ Society (Taylor’s Version)
nodes.desc_html: The most requested club is finally here: The University of Melbourne’s very own Swifties’ Society. We’re enchanted to meet you.

nodes.name: Tabletop Gaming Society
nodes.desc_html: We run weekly boardgame and D&D sessions as well as other fun events throughout semester. So join us on Discord to know what's we've got coming up https://discord.gg/DsYUcQdRFY

nodes.name: Tea Table
nodes.desc_html: Unimelb's Tea Club, fostering tradition, mindfulness, learning, community, calm, and connection.

nodes.name: Technology Consulting Club (MTech)
nodes.desc_html: Melbourne Technology Consulting Club (MTech) is a club dedicated to all things technology consulting.

nodes.name: TEDxUniMelb
nodes.desc_html: In the spirit of TED's philosophy of ideas worth spreading, we hold TEDx events with inspiring speakers - an ideal platform to spread your ideas.

nodes.name: Television & Streaming Society
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Thai Student Association
nodes.desc_html: A space like home away from home for Thai students in Melbourne, welcoming all to explore Thai culture.

nodes.name: Trivia Club
nodes.desc_html: This is a club that is currently seeking affiliation. If the club's affiliation is not finalised, any memberships purchased through the UMSU website will be refunded.

nodes.name: Turkish Society
nodes.desc_html: MUTS seeks to share Turkish culture and bring people together. It is a welcoming platform for Turkish students at UniMelb, and everyone is welcome to join our club and events.

nodes.name: University Network for Investing and Trading (UNIT)
nodes.desc_html: From our inception in 2007, UNIT has become the largest investing and trading society in Australia. Our national network aims to connect all students to opportunities with peers, alumni and sponsors.

nodes.name: Urban Collective
nodes.desc_html: We represent students in the urban planning and urban design programs, focusing on supporting our student community, communicating their talents and advocating for their interests.

nodes.name: VCA Music Theatre Society
nodes.desc_html:
Welcome to the VCA Music Theatre Society! 
Our aim is to make musical theatre more accessible for all of UniMelb. 
Working towards supporting students in the Music Theatre Faculty.

nodes.name: Vegan Club
nodes.desc_html: Join us to explore and enjoy vegan foods.

nodes.name: Very Special Kids Society
nodes.desc_html: Perfect for those with a passion for performing social justice for local families! We raise funds for and spread the work of VSK who support families with kids in life-threatening conditions.

nodes.name: Veterinary Students Society of Victoria (Parkville)
nodes.desc_html: The society aims to connect veterinary students by encouraging an inclusive environment through ideas, social and educational events. Additionally, to act as a communication link with faculty staff.

nodes.name: Vietnamese Students' Association
nodes.desc_html: Here at VSA we aim to bring people with an interest in the Vietnamese culture together. We ensure to create events for everyone, not just those with Vietnamese heritage.

nodes.name: Wildlife Conservation Society
nodes.desc_html: A friendly network of nature-nerds passionate about wildlife conservation & creating a more sustainable future. We run regular volunteering events, plus a heap of fun social events!

nodes.name: Wine Society
nodes.desc_html: Do you like to drink wine? Wish you had more of it? Your next drink is on us! We are relaxed drinkers who share wine knowledge and friendship. We host tastings, give out vouchers, and go to wine bars.

nodes.name: Women in Economics Students' Society
nodes.desc_html: WESS encourages women to study and pursue a career in economics. We aim to promote opportunities available in economics, including mentoring, internship and graduate programs, particularly for women.

nodes.name: Women in Technology
nodes.desc_html: Our mission is to empower fellow female and non-binary students studying technology-related courses.

nodes.name: Women* in Science and Engineering (W.I.S.E.)
nodes.desc_html: Founded in 2010, WISE aims to inspire, promote and celebrate female and non-binary students in STEMM through an inclusive community. We host professional development, networking and social events.

nodes.name: Youth Charity Society
nodes.desc_html: Are you interested in meeting new people, learning new skills, building your resume, and giving back to your community? Join us and be a part of something bigger than yourself.
